case_title: ZENAIDA S. RICHLING VS. NORMA MENDOZA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-12-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, NORMA
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLAINTIFF REGARDING DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO FOLLOW THROUGH THE AGREEMENT REACHED DURING THE MEDIATION. REQUEST NOT TO DISMISS THE CASE FOR FAILURE OF DEFT TO PAY AS AGREED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY NORMA MENDOZA IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR MAY PAY THE JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: $15.00 OR MORE ON THE 15TH OF EVERY MONTH, COMMENCING DECEMBER 15, 2008 UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS FULLY PAID. NO GRACE PERIOD FOR PAYMENT DATE; PAYMENTS BY MONEY ORDER. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLABIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MENDOZA, NORMA HEARING SET FOR NOV-26-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,470.00 FILED BY RICHLING, ZENAIDA S. AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, NORMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICHLING, ZENAIDA S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDOZA, NORMA $3,180.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,260.00, DEFENDANT IN BREACH OF MEDIATION AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT NORMA MENDOZA NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-24-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. MEDIATED SETTLEMENT PENDING. IF NO APPEARANCES, CONTINUE 6 MONTHS FOR PROGRESS REPORT, AND THEREAFTER FOR FUTURE PROGRESS REPORTS FOR A TOTAL OF 18 MONTHS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-23-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF DEFENDANT IS NOT IN FULL COMPLIANCE WITH SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, THE PARTIES SHALL RETURN TO COURT FOR HEARING ON SEPTEMBER 23, 2008 AT 10:00 AM. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE WILL BE CONTINUED FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
